Intelligent Weapon (Alternate).name: 智能武器（替代） Intelligent Weapon (Alternate)
Intelligent Weapon (Alternate).description:
此职业物品用于按可选的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.7thpmGycgWhx5P5U]{只是一把武器，而非族裔} 规则进行游戏。

使用此职业物品时，能力调整值将由该物品设定。使用增益管理器与此职业不兼容。

This class item is included to play by the optional @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.7thpmGycgWhx5P5U]{Just a Weapon, Not an Ancestry} rules.

When using this class item the ability modifiers will be set by the item. Using the boost manager is not compatible with this class.

Tiny Slime (Second Evolution).name: 微型黏液怪（第二次进化） Tiny Slime (Second Evolution)
Tiny Slime (Second Evolution).description:
你是一团极其微小的黏液怪，为了在获得智慧之前以这种体型生存，你经常不得不在不被注意的情况下潜行。你的体型为微型，而非小型或中型。此外，你获得隐秘（技能）技能的受训（熟练度）熟练度等级；如果你已经在隐秘（技能）中受训，则改为获得你选择的另一项技能的受训（熟练度）熟练度等级；并获得@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker}技能专长。

You are an incredibly tiny slime, and in order to survive at your size before you gained sapience, you often had to sneak around unnoticed. Your size is Tiny instead of Small or Medium. Additionally you gain the trained proficiency rank in the Stealth skill, or in another skill of your choice if you were already trained in Stealth, as well as the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat.

Snake Search.name: 蛇类搜索 Snake Search
Snake Search.description:
当你进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Search]{搜索}或@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Seek]{侦察}时，你的蛇也会尝试帮忙，以比你的正常调整值低5的调整值进行一次单独的察觉检定（包括所有适用于你的相关加值与减值）。如果蛇注意到了什么，它们会试图提醒你，不过它们并不比普通的蛇更聪明，可能会觉得与你不同的东西更有趣。

When you @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Search]{Search} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Seek]{Seek}, your snakes try to help too, rolling a separate Perception check with a modifier 5 lower than your normal modifier (including all relevant bonuses and penalties that apply to you). If the snakes notice something, they try to notify you, though they are no more intelligent than normal snakes and might find different things interesting than you do.

Speak with Snakes.name: 与蛇交谈 Speak with Snakes
Speak with Snakes.description:
你可以与蛇交流，包括你头发里的蛇，并且可以使用交涉对蛇进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{留下印象}，并向蛇提出请求。

You can communicate with snakes, including the ones in your hair, and can use Diplomacy to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{Make an Impression} on snakes and Request things from snakes.

Inanimate Mode.name: 无生命模式 Inanimate Mode
Inanimate Mode.description:
如有必要，你可以以一个三动作行动进入无生命状态，使其他生物（除任何属于你传承一部分的持用者外）能够像正常武器一样持用你。在无生命模式下：

  • 你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。
  • 你无法行动，除非是使用你的激活族裔专长、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}、回忆知识，以及使用另一个三动作行动返回你的正常状态。
  • 其他生物不仅能携带你，还能像正常武器一样持用你。这不使用骑乘、擒抱或类似规则。在无生命模式下，你只是被另一位持用者携带的一把武器。

当你不处于无生命模式时，除任何属于你传承一部分的持用者外，没有其他生物能持用你，无论他们是友方还是敌人；不过他们仍然可以毫无困难地携带你同行，而生物必须通过一次对抗你欺瞒DC的察觉检定，才能意识到你不只是普通的魔法武器。若生物正在携带你时你退出无生命模式，他们将无法再持用你，但仍可以继续握住你。若你是附身型或共生型武器，他们可以抓住你，而没有你的持用者你无法做任何事来逃脱。若你是投射型武器，你可以显现你的化身来逃脱。若你是活化武器，且在生物违背你意志握住你时你退出无生命模式，则你被该生物擒抱，并且可以像正常一样@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}。

此能力意在很少使用，例如在特定情境需要时，并不适合常规使用。若要游玩一把有智能、作为物品而非角色、并且始终保持无生命状态的武器，请使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.7thpmGycgWhx5P5U]{只是一把武器，而非族裔}中的规则。

If necessary, you can enter an inanimate state as a three-action activity, allowing other creatures (aside from any wielder that is a part of your heritage) to wield you normally as a weapon. In inanimate mode:

  • You're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg].
  • You can't act except to use your activation ancestry feats, to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, to Recall Knowledge, and to use another three-action activity to return to your normal state.
  • Other creatures can not only carry you, they can wield you normally as a weapon. This doesn't use the rules for riding, grapples, or the like. In inanimate mode, you're simply a weapon being carried by another wielder.

When you're not in inanimate mode, no other creature (aside from any wielder that is a part of your heritage) can wield you, whether they be friend or foe, though they can still carry you along without any trouble, and a creature must succeed at a Perception check against your Deception DC to realize you are more than a normal magic weapon. If you exit inanimate mode while a creature is carrying you, they can no longer wield you, but they can continue to hold onto you. If you're a possessing or symbiotic weapon, they can hold onto you and there's nothing you can do to escape without your wielder. If you're a projecting weapon, you can manifest your avatar to escape. If you're an animated weapon and you exit inanimate mode while a creature is holding you against your will, you're grappled by that creature and can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} normally.

This ability is meant to be rarely used, such as when needed for a particular circumstance, and isn't ideal for standard use. For rules to play an intelligent weapon that is an item rather than a character and remains inanimate at all times, use the rules in @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.7thpmGycgWhx5P5U]{Just a Weapon, Not an Ancestry}.

Avatar.name: 化身 Avatar
Avatar.description:
虽然你实际上是一个觉醒的地城，但你拥有一个化身——一种来自常见族裔或其他族裔的特定形态，你是否获得该形态的许可由GM酌情决定。这个化身由你的地城核心塑造，并被注入你的生命力与精神，使其如同任何其他人的身体一样真实。若你的化身死亡，这个作为有感知实体的地城也会“死亡”。如果地城被彻底摧毁（通常除非在极端情况下才会发生），你的化身也会死亡。

While you are actually an awakened dungeon, you have an avatar, a specific form from a common ancestry or from another ancestry, to which you have access at the GM’s discretion. This avatar is formed from your dungeon core and imbued with your life force and spirit, causing it to be as real as anyone else’s body. If your avatar dies, the dungeon as a sentient entity "dies." If the dungeon is entirely destroyed (which normally won’t happen except in extreme circumstances), your avatar dies as well.

Slime Senses.name: 黏液怪 感官 Slime Senses
Slime Senses.description:
尽管大多数软泥怪没有视觉且听觉较弱，嗅觉、接触以及其他感官也更弱，但有智慧的黏液怪拥有更为完善的神经系统，使其具备与大多数其他族裔成员相同的感官敏锐度。作为交换，它们的运动感知略逊于其他软泥怪，不过它们仍在30尺内拥有作为一种模糊感官的运动感知，使其能够侦测到移动的生物或物体。

While most oozes have no vision and weaker hearing, smell, touch, and other senses, sapient slimes have a more comprehensive nervous system, granting them the same sensory acuity as members of most other ancestries. In exchange, their motion sense is slightly less impressive than other oozes, though they still have motionsense as an imprecise sense within 30 feet, allowing them to detect moving creatures or objects.

Natural Cunning.name: 天生狡黠 Natural Cunning
Natural Cunning.description:
你总能以惊人的准确性知道自己前进的方向。你在生存检定上获得+1环境加值。每当你尝试生存检定以辨别方向、避免迷路或找到路径（包括来自迷宫法术的那些）时，你的成功程度比你掷出的结果高一级。

You always know what direction you're going with startling accuracy. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on Survival checks. Whenever you attempt a Survival check to Sense Direction or avoid getting lost or find your way (including those from the maze spell), your degree of success is one better than the result you rolled.

Living Construct.name: 活构装体 Living Construct
Living Construct.description:
作为一名智能武器角色，你比普通的智能武器拥有大得多的自主性，部分原因在于你拥有心智、生命力与灵魂，而物品智能武器往往只拥有心智。你是生物，而非物体，并且你可以受到对生物生效的效果影响，而不会受到对物体生效的效果影响（除非是能够作用于武器的效果，这些列在你的武器族裔能力中）。你的魔法能量与生命力在你体内流淌，如同类人生物的血液一般。因此，你是一名活的生物。你不具备典型的构装体免疫，可以受到以活的生物为目标的效果影响，并且可以通过正能量正常恢复生命值。此外，当你的生命值降至0时，你不会被摧毁。相反，你的生命能量会试图让你即便在危急关头也能保持活动；当生命值降至0时，你会被击败并开始濒死。

然而，仅仅因为你是活的并拥有灵魂，并不意味着你与其他活的生物具有相同的生理需求。你不需要呼吸、进食或饮水，你也不需要睡眠，但你仍然需要每日一段时间的休息；并且对大多数传承（除活化武器外的所有传承）而言，你仍需要应对你的持用者对呼吸、进食、饮水与休息的需求。在你的休息期间，你必须进入一种持续2小时的休憩状态，这类似于睡眠，但你能觉察周遭环境，且不会因处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}而承受减值。与睡眠类似，如果你过久不进入这种休憩状态，你会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}，且在你休息2小时之前无法恢复。

As an intelligent weapon character, you possess much greater agency than a normal intelligent weapon, partially because you have a mind, life force, and spirit, while item intelligent weapons often only have a mind. You are a creature, not an object, and you can be affected by effects that work on creatures, not effects that work on objects (except effects that can apply to weapons, listed in your weapon ancestry ability). Your magical energies and life force flow through you, much like the blood of humanoids. As a result, you are a living creature. You don't have the typical construct immunities, can be affected by effects that target a living creature and can recover Hit Points normally via positive energy. Additionally, you aren't destroyed when reduced to 0 Hit Points. Instead, your life energy attempts to keep you active even in dire straits; you're knocked out and begin dying when reduced to 0 Hit Points.

However, just because you're alive and have a spirit doesn't mean you have the same physiological needs as other living creatures. You don't need to breathe, eat, drink, and you don't need to sleep, but you do still need a daily period of rest, and for most heritages (all except animated weapon), you still need to contend with your wielder's need to breathe, eat, drink, and rest. During your period of rest, you must enter a restful state for 2 hours, which is similar to sleeping, except you are aware of your surroundings and don't take penalties for being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}. Much like with sleeping, if you go too long without entering your restful state, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} and can't recover until you rest for 2 hours.

Amphibious Slime (Second Evolution).name: 两栖黏液怪（第二次进化） Amphibious Slime (Second Evolution)
Amphibious Slime (Second Evolution).description:
你生活在同时具有水域与陆地区域的环境中，并且已经习惯于在水中移动。你获得10尺的游泳速度以及两栖（特征）。如同所有具有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你既可以在水中呼吸，也可以在空气中呼吸。

You lived in an environment with both aquatic and terrestrial sections, and you've grown accustomed to moving through water. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air.

Agile Slime (Second Evolution).name: 敏捷黏液怪（第二次进化） Agile Slime (Second Evolution)
Agile Slime (Second Evolution).description:
虽然黏液怪已经比其他某些软泥怪更快，但你的移动甚至比其他黏液怪还要迅速。你的速度为25英尺，而非20英尺。

While slimes are already faster than some other oozes, your movements are quick even compared to other slimes. Your Speed is 25 feet, instead of 20 feet.

Horn.name: 号角 Horn
Horn.description:
你有两根巨大的角，可以用来刺穿你的敌人。你获得一次角的徒手攻击，造成1d6穿刺伤害，并具有推撞（武器特征）武器特征。该徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

You have two big horns you can use to gore your foes. You have a horn unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the shove weapon trait. This unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Enter the Dungeon.name: 进入地城 Enter the Dungeon
Enter the Dungeon.description:
你和你的盟友可以在一个耗时一小时的过程中进入作为你真实形态的异次元地城，尝试挑战其中的一层并获得特殊奖励。参见 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-ancestries.Item.AiRUSV6igezBGpen]{内在地城} 以了解你的地城类别。

You and your allies can enter the extradimensional dungeon that is your true form in a process that takes an hour, attempting to challenge one of the floors and gain special rewards. See @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-ancestries.Item.AiRUSV6igezBGpen]{The Dungeon Within} for your dungeon category.

Object Surprise.name: 物体惊奇 Object Surprise
Object Surprise.description:
如果你在遭遇开始时处于无法移动状态且仍为物体形态，你可以用欺瞒检定进行先攻掷骰，并且只要他们尚未行动过，那些相信你只是普通物体的生物在对抗你时会处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}状态。

If you begin an encounter immobile and still in object form, you can roll a Deception check for initiative, and creatures who believed you to be a normal object are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} against you as long as they haven't acted yet.

Twilight Slime (Second Evolution).name: 暮光黏液怪（第二次进化） Twilight Slime (Second Evolution)
Twilight Slime (Second Evolution).description:
你不仅能够看见——这点不同于大多数软泥怪——而且你发展出的视觉也优于其他有感知的黏液怪，使你能在昏暗光照环境下看得很清楚。你获得微光视觉。

Not only are you able to see, unlike most oozes, but the vision you've developed is superior to other sapient slimes, allowing you to see well in dim light conditions. You gain low-light vision.

Minimal vitals.name: 最低生命体征 Minimal vitals
Minimal vitals.description:
黏液怪的核心是它们最大的优势，也是它们唯一的弱点。这意味着，与大多数其他生物相比，用精确攻击伤害它们更困难，即使它们并不像其他软泥怪那样对这类效果近乎免疫。黏液怪对精确伤害具有抗力，数值等于 1 + 它们等级的一半。

Slimes’ nucleus is their greatest strength, and also their only weak point. This means that it’s harder to harm them with precision attacks than most other creatures, even if they aren’t quite as immune to such things as other oozes. Slimes have resistance to precision damage equal to 1 + half their level.

Doppelganger's Disguise.name: 变形怪的伪装 Doppelganger's Disguise
Doppelganger's Disguise.description:
你的变形怪变形能力使你能够轻松将自身形态转变为各种类人伪装。你不需要伪装工具包也能进行冒充。你可以使用变形怪的伪装，以单动作冒充一种你所在地区常见的小型或中型类人形态，该形态在创建角色时选择，称为你的“偏好形态”；并且你可以在1分钟内冒充任何其他小型或中型类人形态。当你以这种方式使用变形怪的伪装时，你的冒充动作获得奥术与变化特征。与普通变形怪的改变形态不同，它不会获得变形（特征），因为那会使你难以使用其他变形效果。你可以以单动作返回你的自然形态。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.zC0LlCUAyQ7vfEub]{效果: 变形怪的伪装}

Your doppelganger shapeshifting allows you to shift your form into various humanoid disguises with ease. You don't need a disguise kit to Impersonate. You can use doppelganger's disguise to Impersonate one Small or Medium humanoid form common to your region, chosen at character creation, called your "preferred form" with a single action, and any other Small or Medium humanoid form in 1 minute. When you use doppelganger's disguise in this way, your Impersonate action gains the arcane and transmutation traits. Unlike normal doppelgangers' Change Shape, it doesn't gain the polymorph trait, as that would make it difficult to use other polymorph effects. You can return to your natural form with a single action.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.zC0LlCUAyQ7vfEub]{Effect: Doppelganger's Disguise}

Change Shape.name: 改变形态 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
作为一名恶鬼特立独行者，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.JxpwCIZopoEWvOtb]{Change Shape} 能力，使你能够根据你的传承采取一种替代形态。

As an oni maverick, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.JxpwCIZopoEWvOtb]{Change Shape} ability, allowing you to adopt an alternate form depending on your heritage.

Object Form.name: 物体形态 Object Form
Object Form.description:
作为拟形怪，你可以在你的自然形态——由几丁质甲壳板保护的柔软紫色肉质身体——与一种单一的偏好物体形态之间来回切换；该偏好物体形态看起来像一个与你体型相同的简单无生命物体，例如宝藏箱。大多数拟形怪一生中绝大部分时间都保持在偏好物体形态，而你已经将其中一种形态臻于完美。你可以以单动作在这两种形态间切换，该动作具有专注（特征）。不同于普通拟形怪改变形态的能力，此能力不会获得变形（特征），因为那会使你难以使用其他变形效果。你还可以通过稍微改变自身构成来使用Impersonate，将自己伪装成其他中型物体。你不需要伪装工具包就能以这种方式Impersonate成不同的物体，而且只需要1分钟，而非10分钟。

当你处于物体形态时，你仍然可以显现出简单的拟足与腿部，没有手或脚；你可以用它们行走、抓持并操控物体（更多信息见“拟形怪与操控”边栏）。你进行拟足徒手攻击而非拳击徒手攻击，但除此之外它们具有相同的数据。

以单动作，你可以保持静止并假装自己是与你偏好物体形态同类的普通物体。只要你没有握持任何东西（那将需要可见的拟足）、你不移动、并且你不进行任何需要除心智以外事物的动作，你看起来就是那类物体。若要看穿你的把戏，另一名生物必须通过一次针对你欺瞒DC的检定，可以通过搜索或回忆知识来进行（通常使用工艺、神秘学，或适当的学识（技能））。此能力对那些在你使用该能力期间正在观察你，或以其他方式看到你是拟形怪的生物无效。即使他们无法确定你是拟形怪，如果你的物体形态在你当前所在位置显得不寻常，其他生物仍可能保持警惕或感到好奇。

As a mimic, you can switch back and forth between your natural form, a soft purple fleshy body protected by chitinous plates, and a single preferred object form resembling a simple inanimate object of your size, such as a treasure chest. Most mimics spend the majority of their time in a preferred object form, and you have perfected one such form. You can switch between those two forms as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. Unlike normal mimics' ability to change their form, it doesn't gain the polymorph trait, as that would make it difficult to use other polymorph effects. You can also use Impersonate to disguise yourself as other Medium objects by shifting around some of your composition. You don't need a disguise kit to Impersonate a different object in this way, and it only takes 1 minute to do so, instead of 10 minutes.

While in your object form, you can still manifest simple pseudopods and legs, with no hands or feet, which you can use to walk, hold, and manipulate objects (see the Mimics and Manipulation sidebar for more information). You make pseudopod unarmed attacks instead of fist unarmed attacks, though they otherwise have the same statistics.

As a single action, you can stay still and pretend to be an ordinary object of the same kind as your preferred object form. As long as you aren't holding anything (which would require visible pseudopods), you don't move, and you don't take any actions requiring anything other than your mind, you appear to be an object of that kind. To see through your ruse, another creature must succeed at a check against your Deception DC, either by Seeking or Recalling Knowledge (typically using Crafting, Occultism, or an appropriate Lore skill). This ability doesn't work against creatures that were observing you or otherwise saw that you were a mimic while you were using the ability. Even if they can't tell for sure you are a mimic, if your object form stands out as unusual in your current location, other creatures might still be wary or curious.

Amorphous Form.name: 无定形形态 Amorphous Form
Amorphous Form.description:
黏液怪能够在一定程度上塑造自己的形态，不过当它们完全处于休息状态时，往往会呈现为一个大致半球状的水洼形状，核心位于中央。作为一个单动作（具有专注与操作（特征）），它们可以在其自然形态与一种模糊的人形之间切换；该人形仍明显由软泥构成并拥有核心。由于其无定形的形态，它们可以像自己的体型小一档那样穿过狭窄空间（若本就为微型，则甚至能穿过更狭窄的空间）。黏液怪没有正常的手臂与手，但它们仍能通过形成至多两条临时的拟足来持握并操作物体；这些拟足没有手或手指。每条拟足都能持握一件单手物品，或两条拟足一同持握一件双手物品。

默认情况下，这在持握与操作物品方面与一般祖裔的运作方式相同，不过在GM的裁量下，某些操作动作对黏液怪而言可能更容易，而某些可能更困难。你以拟足徒手攻击取代拳头徒手攻击，不过除此之外它们具有相同的数据。

Slimes can shape their form somewhat, though when they’re completely at rest, they tend to be shaped like a roughly dome-shaped puddle with a nucleus at the center. As a single action, which has the concentrate and manipulate trait, they can switch alter their rough physical shape between their natural form and a vaguely humanoid form that’s still obviously made of ooze and possessing a nucleus. Because of their amorphous form, they can move through tight spaces as if they were one size smaller than they are (or even tighter spaces if they were already Tiny). Slimes don’t have normal arms and hands, but they are still able to hold and manipulate objects by forming up to two temporary pseudopods, which don’t have hands or fingers. Each pseudopod can hold a one-handed item, or the two pseudopods together can hold a two-handed item.

By default, this works the same way as normal ancestries do in terms of holding and manipulating items, though at the GM’s discretion, some manipulate actions might be easier for a slime and some might be more difficult. You make pseudopod unarmed attacks instead of fist unarmed attacks, though they otherwise have the same statistics.

Renegade.name: 叛逆者 Renegade
Renegade.description:
作为一名叛逆恶魔，你已摆脱罪孽的枷锁，能够选择自己的命运。不同于大多数其他恶魔，你没有你传承的恶魔所典型具有的罪孽弱点。然而，你已经切断了与深渊的联系，因此你无法使用@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.tsKnoBuBbKMXkiz5]{深渊契约}仪式或其他类似能力。

As a renegade demon, you are free from the fetters of your sin and can choose your own destiny. Unlike most other demons, you don't have the sin vulnerability typical for demons of your heritage. However, you've severed your connection to the Abyss, so you can't use the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.tsKnoBuBbKMXkiz5]{Abyssal Pact} ritual or other similar abilities.

Demonic Fortitude.name: 恶魔坚韧 Demonic Fortitude
Demonic Fortitude.description:
你的身体比凡人更为坚韧，使你每等级获得额外1点生命值。然而，作为一名叛逆的恶魔，你很容易受到善良伤害的伤害，或被邪恶伤害所腐化。无论你的阵营如何，你都可以同时承受邪恶与善良伤害，并且你对这两种伤害类型都获得弱点，数值等于你等级的一半（最低1）。

Your body is tougher than a mortal's, causing you to gain 1 additional Hit Point per level. However, as a renegade demon, you can be easily harmed by good damage or corrupted by evil damage. Regardless of your alignment, you can take both evil and good damage, and you gain weakness to both damage types equal to half your level (minimum 1).

Unearthly Beauty.name: 超凡之美 Unearthly Beauty
Unearthly Beauty.description:
你那由自然的威严灌注的超自然美貌，使你的形态在旁观者的潜意识中显得与众不同，并以一种微妙的方式吸引几乎任何具有审美概念的存在。你可以选择让你的美貌呈现为令人安心、迷惑人心或令人压倒的形态。若你选择令人安心的美貌，你将受训于交涉并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand} 技能专长（即使你不满足其先决条件）。若你选择迷惑人心的美貌，你将受训于欺瞒并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} 专长。最后，若你选择令人压倒的美貌，你将受训于威吓并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} 技能专长。若你已经受训于对应的技能，则你改为受训于你选择的另一项技能。

Your supernatural beauty, imbued by the majesty of nature, causes your form to appear subconsciously different to onlookers in a way that subtly appeals to almost any being with a concept of aesthetics. You choose whether your beauty manifests as comforting, beguiling, or overwhelming. If you choose a comforting beauty, you are trained in Diplomacy and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand} skill feat (even though you don't meet its prerequisites). If you choose a beguiling beauty, you are trained in Deception and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} feat. Finally, if you choose an overwhelming beauty, you are trained in Intimidation and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat. If you're already trained in the corresponding skill, you become trained in another skill of your choice instead.

Weapon.name: 武器 Weapon
Weapon.description:
当你同时也是一个活的生物时，你是一把等级0或1的简易、军用或高级武器：要么是一把常见武器，要么是另一把你拥有许可的武器。

你可以像同类武器一样，照常使用大多数符文（或《Battlezoo Bestiary》中的怪物部件）进行升级，并且你也可以受到提供类似增益的法术与能力影响，例如魔法武器。然而，那些依赖于你是一个物体的符文或其他物品升级与能力、假定你不是生物的符文或其他物品升级与能力，或基于不同前提的符文或其他物品升级与能力（例如设定或提高硬度或物体生命值的符文，或一个假想的符文以类似不可摧毁盾牌的方式使武器对所有伤害无敌）都不起作用。你的GM决定哪些符文与效果不能适用。通常而言，任何仅仅让你在被正常挥舞时更擅长战斗的东西都能正常运作。另一方面，任何让武器更坚韧、更难被摧毁、更不易丢失，或能让物体在各处传送、或赋予物体机动性（如舞动符文）的东西，永远不被允许。GM也可能认为，按照上述标准，允许你把自己升级为某一把特定武器是合适的。若你的职业授予你一把特殊武器（例如武器发明家）或与你的一把武器相关联（例如武器器具奇术师），只要你满足职业施加的任何其他需求或限制，你就可以为那把武器选择你自己。

无论你是以奥术之力锻造而成、以繁盛的原初能量生长而成、以秘法密语低吟而成，还是作为一把神圣武器被灌注以祝福，某种特定的魔法在你的创造过程中都至关重要。选择一种在你的创造中使用的魔法根源，称为你的“武器魔法根源”。对于带有魔法（特征）或依赖于魔法根源的智能武器专长而言，这是你的魔法根源；同样，这也是用于依赖于魔法根源的怪物部件灌注属性的魔法根源。

While you are also a living creature, you are a level 0 or 1 simple, martial, or advanced weapon, either a common weapon or another weapon to which you have access.

You can be upgraded using most runes (or monster parts from Battlezoo Bestiary) as normal for a weapon of your kind, and you can be affected by spells and abilities that provide similar benefits, such as magic weapon. However, runes or other item upgrades and abilities that depend upon being an object, assume you aren't a creature or are otherwise based on different assumptions (such as runes that set or increase Hardness or object Hit Points, or a hypothetical rune that makes a weapon invincible to all damage in a manner similar to an indestructible shield) don't work. Your GM determines which runes and effects can't apply. Typically, anything that simply makes a weapon better at fighting when you wield it normally works fine. On the other hand, anything that makes a weapon more resilient, harder to destroy, or harder to lose, or that teleports the object around or grants the object mobility (like the dancing rune) are never allowed. The GM might determine it's appropriate to allow you to upgrade yourself into a specific weapon using the above criteria. If your class grants you a special weapon (such as weapon inventor) or is connected to a weapon (such as weapon implement thaumaturge), you can choose yourself for that weapon as long as you meet any other requirements or restrictions imposed by your class.

Whether you were forged with arcane power, were grown with verdant primal energy, were whispered with occult secrets, or were imbued with blessings as a divine weapon, a certain sort of magic was important during your creation. Choose a single magical tradition used in your creation, which is called your "weapon magical tradition." This is your magical tradition for intelligent weapon feats with the magical trait or that depend on a magical tradition, as well as for monster part imbued properties depending on a magical tradition.
